title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CBRE India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CBRE India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
